skill.description: Abilty to work with Databrics Genie

request.action: Reach the target and make skills for the agent

rules.rule: All agent artifacts, including CLAUDE.md and AGENT.md must be saved to the agent artifacts location

Agent skills should be saved to "skills" subfolder, each skill should be saved in it own subfolder of the "skills" subfolder. Making skills/ folder content, follow the best practices according of skills folders
To make skill analize the skill rag uri - extract all needed inforation for achieving the skill goals and made the skill artifacts according to it
Never save or accept any tokens, passwords etc. For using thish information request to save this information to environments variables and provide powershell script for this in copy-pasta manner
